resolved.item: Level One index list P.P.E. vs spell blocks
resolved.question: Alphabetical index on p. 127 lists lower P.P.E. than each spell's stat block (e.g. See Aura (2) vs P.P.E.: 6; Thunderclap (2) vs P.P.E.: 4). Which value is authoritative?
resolved.bookExcerpt: Level One list: See Aura (2) … Thunderclap (2). Spell blocks: See Aura P.P.E.: 6; Thunderclap P.P.E.: 4.
resolved.userRuling: Use spell description block P.P.E. (matches existing production encoding).
